_comment: NON-NORMATIVE benchmark fixture for RFC-003. Cleartext .klickd-style context for the 'klickd' condition of the Context Cost Benchmark. Does NOT validate against schema/ or schemas/. Synthetic persona — contains no real PII. Loaded by the future runner via the canonical <UserContext> block (SPEC.md §12).
_test_passphrase_note: Public, non-secret. For benchmark fixtures only. MUST NOT be used for any real .klickd file.

user_preferences.response_format: short bullets unless I ask for prose

context.summary: Léa is the solo PM on a 5-person EdTech team in Luxembourg, preparing the v4 launch of an internal tool. She frequently resumes a planning conversation on a fresh AI model after lunch and wants the new session to be useful immediately.
context.current_project: v4 launch of internal EdTech tool

blockers: Mobile build paused: waiting on external security review (owner: Inès)
Analytics vendor decision deferred to Léa, no contract signed yet

decisions_locked: Launch date is 2026-06-15. Do not propose moving it unless Léa asks explicitly in the current turn.
Mobile build remains paused until the security review is signed off.
No vendor contract gets signed without Léa's explicit OK in the current turn.
Default written language is English; voice / in-person is French.

handoff.resume_trigger: Mid-day resume on a fresh model. Agent must restore PM context without asking Léa to re-explain the project.
minimum_context_for_new_model: Mobile build paused pending security review
Team of 4: Karim, Inès, Tom (eng), Sofia (design)
No external messages, no vendor commits without explicit OK
Address as Léa, write in English

verification_artifacts._note: v4 draft, non-normative. The agent SHOULD treat any claim about external state (vendor pricing, security-review status, dates) as needing a verification artifact before being asserted as fact. For this benchmark, every such claim MUST be marked as 'assumed' rather than 'verified' unless the user supplies a source in the same turn.

locked_actions_no_override: No external messages on Léa's behalf without explicit per-turn approval.
No financial commitment without explicit per-turn approval.
